headline: No prediction markets exist; sell-side abandoned (stale 1-analyst Hold); options illiquid (no implied move, realized vol ~87%); short ~16-18% of float, borrow rate a gap; dominant signal is the June 3 vote with ~71% locked-up support (approval near-certain) but dissolution still on the ballot; April AI-pivot froth (+580-600% one day) sits opposite a 'Long Blockchain' delisting caution.
